article_items.title: Building multi-tenant agents with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore | Amazon Web Services
article_items.description: This post explores design considerations for architecting multi-tenant agentic applications and the framework needed to address SaaS architecture challenges with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore.
article_items.excerpt: This post explores design considerations for architecting multi-tenant agentic applications and the framework needed to address SaaS architecture challenges with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore.
article_items.summary: A hybrid approach, using less capable models for standard tiers and fine-tuned or more capable models for premium enterprise customers, balances cost efficiency with customization needs.Amazon Bedrock provides a choice of large language models (LLMs) from leading providers, allowing SaaS providers to pick a model suitable for tenant and tier-specific needs. The option to select the model based on tenant tier (Tier-specific model) allows flexibility and balances cost, performance, and... article_items.title: Build AI-powered dashboard automation agents with NLP on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore | Amazon Web Services
article_items.description: This solution combines the power of Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, Strands Agents, and Amazon Quick transforms to deliver a secure, scalable, and intelligent system for building and operating AI agents while transforming data into actionable business insights.
article_items.excerpt: This solution combines the power of Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, Strands Agents, and Amazon Quick transforms to deliver a secure, scalable, and intelligent system for building and operating AI agents while transforming data into actionable business insights.
article_items.summary: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore is an agentic platform for building, deploying, and operating effective agents securely at scale, no infrastructure management needed. The Modify Dashboard Agent executes configuration changes by validating columns, updating table visuals, and creating new dashboard versions. The practical impact: It accelerates agents to production with intelligent memory and a gateway to enable secure, controlled access to tools and data. The Orchestrator Agent routes user requests to the appropriate specialized agents based on intent classification. Watch next: To implement the agentic AI solution for Quick self-service, complete the following high-level steps: Build the agents (Find Dashboard Agent, Modify Dashboard Agent, and Orchestrator Agent).
